entry.title: The Deepfake Watchlist: Week of June 5–11, 2026
entry.summary: The Deepfake Watchlist is Resemble AI's weekly surveillance of synthetic media incidents, ongoing cases, and disputed content shaping the news cycle. Each week we track confirmed incidents, emerging attack vectors, and claims under investigation, alongside the provenance, detection, and policy threads running underneath them.

entry.title: Chatterbox Multilingual v3: TTS with embedded watermarking for 25 languages
entry.summary: Chatterbox Multilingual v3 open source ships with PerTh watermarking embedded by default on every self-hosted audio output, across every supported language. Provenance and the ability to automatically watermark outputs is a major component of this release as regulation like the EU AI Act Article 50 loom, and as voice AI and text-to-speech models strive to be more trustworthy and verifiable at generation time.

entry.title: Detect Candidate Fraud In Remote Hiring: Red Flags, Funnel Checks, And Access Risk
entry.summary: Learn best practices for detecting candidate fraud in remote hiring with funnel checks, interview red flags, identity review, and live deepfake detection.

entry.title: How to integrate TrueFoundry with Resemble AI
entry.summary: This post explains how the TrueFoundry AI Gateway exposes TTS providers and how Resemble's native API surface is preserved through the pass-through layer and how failover across multiple TTS providers works through Virtual Models.

entry.title: Resemble AI vs. Steg.ai: Comparing AI Watermarking Solutions (2026)
entry.summary: Compare Resemble AI vs Steg.ai to find the best watermarking solution for multimodal content. Explore features, pricing, and use cases for secure content.

entry.title: How to Detect Deepfake Interviews in Remote Hiring in 2026?
entry.summary: Explore how you can detect deepfake interviews in remote hiring before candidate fraud becomes an identity and access risk.

entry.title: Audio Deepfake Detection Benchmark Results: How 8 Systems Performed in 2026
entry.summary: Podonos ran a neutral benchmark across 8 audio deepfake detection systems. Resemble AI ranked #1 at 98.1%. Here's what the full results actually mean for buyers.

entry.title: The dragon said "spaghetti." A six-year-old lost her mind. Inside the voice pipeline that made Crayola Adventures an Apple Design Award winner.
entry.summary: Without a solution, the game didn't ship. RED Games needed a way to narrate open player input, in real time, across 13 languages, without it sounding like a robot. Here's what they built on Resemble AI.
